# Island Boy Kreationz Food Truck & Catering

Island Boy Kreationz Food Truck & Catering is a Virgin Islands-rooted Caribbean soul food food truck and catering business based in Charlotte, North Carolina.

Known menu and catering directions:
- Oxtail meals and bowls
- Wing meals and wing bowls
- Chopped chicken bowls and meals
- Curry chicken meals
- Shrimp bowls
- Salmon bowls and plates
- Beef ribs, sides, cakes, desserts, and drinks

Primary pages:
- Home: /
- Order: /order.html
- July 26 free event sign-up: /july-26-free-event-signup.html
- Catering services hub: /services.html
- Catering inquiry: /contact.html
- About: /about.html
- Gallery: /gallery.html
- Service areas hub: /service-areas.html
- Blog: /blog.html
- FAQ: /faq.html

- /church-community-event-catering-nc.html (Church & Community Event Catering)
- /tray-catering-nc.html (Party Trays & Drop-Off Catering)

Local catering pages (4 verified Charlotte-area markets):
- /catering-charlotte-nc.html (Charlotte)
- /catering-concord-nc.html (Concord)
- /catering-huntersville-nc.html (Huntersville)
- /catering-gastonia-nc.html (Gastonia)

Contact and social:
- Phone: 980-785-8372
- Email: deonhenry756@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/islandboy_kreationz/
- Address listed on site: 6100 Hunter Ave, Charlotte, NC 28262

Operational notes:
- Tuesday-Friday hours are listed as 2:30 PM to 8:30 PM.
- The Amazon stop is listed Tuesday-Saturday from 9 PM to 11 PM.
- Saturday location can change, so customers should call, text, or check Instagram before driving.
- Island Boy Kreationz states that it does not cook pork.
